docs.title: Home
docs.text:
This website serves as a comprehensive project portfolio. It is designed to showcase my professional experience, skills, and accomplishments in a virtual and easily accessible format.

Navigate to my project portfolio here or keep on reading below to learn more about me.

docs.title: Who am I?
docs.text:
My name is Austin. I love to learn and am constantly trying out new things. My motivation to obtain new knowledge and my perseverance to seek it out have cultivated my passion for self-advacement in all aspects of my life. Whether it is studying for a difficult class, learning to juggle on a unicycle, doing a backflip, or anything else, I am driven to learn.

In fact, that's pretty much the motivation behind creating this website, I thought it would be cool to build my own website and so I decided to learn how.

docs.text: See my project portfolio

docs.title: Code examples
docs.text:
An example of a codeblock for Python:

add_numbers.py
# Function to add two numbers
def add_two_numbers(num1, num2):
    return num1 + num2

# Example usage
result = add_two_numbers(5, 3)
print('The sum is:', result)
code-examples.md
// Function to concatenate two strings
function concatenateStrings(str1, str2) {
  return str1 + str2;
}

// Example usage
const result = concatenateStrings("Hello, ", "World!");
console.log("The concatenated string is:", result);

docs.title: Code Blocks in Content Tabs
Flowcharts
docs.text:
graph LR
  A[Start] --> B{Failure?};
  B -->|Yes| C[Investigate...];
  C --> D[Debug];
  D --> B;
  B ---->|No| E[Success!];

docs.title: Sequence Diagrams
docs.text:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Server->>Terminal: Send request
  loop Health
      Terminal->>Terminal: Check for health
  end
  Note right of Terminal: System online
  Terminal-->>Server: Everything is OK
  Terminal->>Database: Request customer data
  Database-->>Terminal: Customer data

docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

I love to play

docs.title: Project Portfolio
docs.text: Welcome to my project portfolio. Enjoy exploring the various projects I have done.

docs.title: Highlighted Projects
docs.text:
These projects are my favorites and contributed significantly to my learning and growth.

CAD Portfolio Description coming soon. Learn more. Rocket Water Ballast System Followed a complete engineering design process to create a functioning water ejection system for a high altitude rocket. Learn more. Aerodynamic Analysis and Optimization Description coming soon. Learn more. Rocket with H Level Motor Description coming soon. Learn more.

Total time: 80 hours
